comment.body: You can't learn through misunderstanding. Professors at least nudge you into the correct direction. But if the direction is "read it again" then it is no direction at all. If I read something in Romanian 10000 times, I will still not understand Romanian.

comment.body:
I used to think this way as well and I misunderstand what I want to learn sometimes. But then in the worst case, reality lets one learn through trial and error. And actually when one stares at Romanian texts, one might see repeated patterns, frequently used words, or words that are similar to other languages that one already knows, and these can help one decipher, and then what's more tricky is sometimes one has to read between the lines... 

It's true that the chats are not the easiest to navigate, but there is a search function allowing one to look for keywords in past chats etc.

comment.body: I agree with you terrance.  I also have been in the markets for a while and since I joined this sub ive been doing worse.  My second sub only; i rarely sub because its usually not worth it and Im proven right again.  I only joined because of the extensive knowledge that alma had and its $35 but it doesnt translate into pnl for me if anything lost opp cost.  It prevented me from participating in this rally which I was expecting; her posts are not clear and flip often.  Im not blaming her for anything; I chose to stay out and be cautious even though I had bullish signals.  Im done after this month GL to all.

comment.body: Excellent points and fully agree . i’ve been trading since 2007 and this is my 3rd sub i’ve ever been in , really like alma analysis on twitter , hence why i sub , but reading her daily / weekly post are very confusing 90% of time. i have grown my acct from $11k to 6 figures . so i don’t think the problem is about being experience or inexperience trader . i am actually down  for the month of april in my SPX/ES acct  . i have decided it’s no longer in my best interest to stay in the group . Alma you are a very smart and talented trader and i wish you nothing but success. take care guys . 🫶🏻

comment.body: Do ppl here suffer from perceptual disorders? Or is it me? Someone pls show me a 35$ thread in which loud and ckear warnings have been issued several times since mid-February 2025, first of a stair-step falling market ('spot-decay') and finally of the Liberation Day massacre in April. Alma has repeatedly and clearly reminded ppl to get into 'lifeboats' well before April 7. How loud do you have to shout? All documented here, if one cares to scroll back. That call alone could have made everyone here carefree for at least a year - instead, i just read people ranting. What‘s wrong with you?

comment.body: have gotten DM's from a handful of people saying the same, which is why i've been more vocal as of late. I have been bull posting occasionally for the past several weeks in here just to give another perspective. whether headlines are doom and gloom, does not matter. price action is king. i've posted in support and criticized Alma. but some choose to blindly believe she is a long term profitable trader, knows political insiders, etc. Who really knows? I wouldn't be surprised if some of the supports in this chat are just her alts. Either way, I enjoy her geopolitical analysis and just take it at face value. I dont try to read into it, learn and forecast what the markets will do. People smarter than me will do that and i'll just follow the price action
